steps: Follow the marker to the meeting point.|Enter the building.|Talk to Lucia.
tips: Always check your minimap for objective markers.
trivia: This is the very first mission of GTA6.

steps: Pick up the package from the trunk.|Drive to the safehouse.|Avoid police attention on the way.
tips: Use back alleys to lose wanted level quickly.

steps: Meet Jason at the diner.|Scout the target location.|Choose your approach: stealth or loud.|Execute the heist.|Lose the cops and return to safehouse.
tips: Stealth approach: enter through the back door after 10pm. Guards have a shift change at midnight.
trivia: Mission introduces the heist preparation system — your first taste of GTA6's expanded planning mechanics.

steps: Drive to Lucia's family home in Little Havana.|Defend the house from rival gang attack.|Chase down the fleeing gang leader.
tips: Take cover behind the sofa for the best firing angle. Enemies come in 3 waves.
trivia: Little Havana is a returning district from the original Vice City — expect many callbacks.

steps: Ambush the armored truck at the bridge.|Fight through SWAT response.|Escape through the Everglades.|Switch vehicles at the bait car location.|Lose 5-star wanted level.
tips: SWAT uses tear gas — stay mobile and avoid confined spaces. Use water to lose helicopters in the swamp.
trivia: The 5-star escape sequence is the first major difficulty spike — many players will need multiple attempts.
